Bilingual patient counseling in ambulatory care

Abstract

This SAGE fixture keeps the English abstract in a dedicated abstract section. The text summarizes the intervention and the outcome measures without overlapping with the discussion section.

Resumen

Este resumen en espanol debe conservarse junto al abstract ingles. Sigue siendo parte del resumen y no debe terminar clasificado como texto del cuerpo.

Discussion

The discussion section explains how medication counseling quality improved, how the bilingual workflow changed clinician behavior, and why this belongs to the body rather than the abstract area.

A second paragraph keeps the body classification stable and makes the fixture representative of a real full-text article layout.
